<parameter=code>

print('BEFORE nodes count:', len(before_nodes))
print('AFTER nodes count:', len(after_nodes))
# Compare by hash to track objects
before_hashes = {n['hash(n['hash']: n for n in before.segmentation['nodes']}
after_hashes = {n['hash']: n for n in after.segmentation['nodes']}
# Find what changed

for h in before_hashes:
    if h not in after_hashes:
        bn = before_hashes[h]
        print(f'  hash={h}, color={bn["color"]}, pixels={bn["pixels}')
print('\nNodes only in after:')
for h in after_hashes:
    if h not in before_hashes:
        an = after_hashes[h]
        print(f'  hash={h}, color={an["color"]}, pixels={an["pixels"]}')
</parameter>
</function>

<parameter=code>

after = last_transition.after_frame
